status: COMPLETE — enumeration proven on real Everon (TBD_Dev_POC.ent + Eden). K1/K1b/K2/K5/K6/K7 PASS; K3/K4 honest RED (tile production = T-090.1/.1.1, out of spike scope).
subregionNote: Auto-selected by the plugin's 5x5 scan as the densest building 512 m cell (coastal SW, near RaccoonRock). 7530 entities in the AABB, 7401 with origin inside the cell.

S0.note: FALSE-POSITIVE LESSON: wb_state initially reported entityCount=1235873 + Everon bounds while the World Editor actually had an EMPTY 'Unnamed empty world' (GetEditorEntityCount is unreliable as a world-loaded signal). The real world TBD_Framework/worlds/TBD_Dev_POC.ent (Eden/Everon terrain + TBD game mode) was opened by the user; viewport shows real towns (Gorey, Highstone, RaccoonRock). Always confirm a non-empty world before enumerating.

S1.enumerationMethod: BaseWorld.QueryEntitiesByAABB(mins,maxs,callback) over a 512 m cell; world handle = topLevelRoot.GetWorld(); prefab = WorldEditorAPI.EntityToSource(e).GetAncestor().GetResourceName().
S1.keyFinding: Flat WorldEditorAPI.GetEditorEntity loop reaches only top-level roots (~10); placed objects are reached via the runtime spatial query. QueryEntitiesByAABB returns 0 in an EMPTY world (the initial failure) and returns real objects once the world is loaded — it does work in World Editor edit mode for a populated world.

S1b.note: I1 holds (41+7355+5=7401). needsReview=224 prefab types (rocks/bushes/vegetation not covered by the thin prefab-classify.json rules) — rule authoring is T-090.2, out of spike scope. Building rows present (HouseRuins, House_Mountain/Wooden, Castle walls) → K1 green.

S2.mcpEvidence: api_search GetWorldBounds -> IEntity exposes void GetWorldBounds(out vector mins, out vector maxs) (world-space AABB). Plugin emits halfExtentsM=(max-min)/2 per row. Real example: House_Mountain_E_1I01 halfExtentsM=[13.3683,7.38779,13.644]; b_rosa_canina_0s=[1.4306,0.655229,1.31641]. Not kind-default — measured per entity.
S2.note: GetWorldBounds is an AXIS-ALIGNED world bound; a true oriented-OBB (local bounds + yaw) would combine local extents with GetAngles()[1]. World-AABB is sufficient for N6 footprint at spike scope; T-090.6 can refine to local-OBB if needed.

S3.result: FAIL — source found, no one-call capture (ESCALATE per spec S3 fallback)
S3.satelliteSource: system/terrain/defSatMap_BCR.edds (engine default satellite map) + per-terrain SAP/satellite background (wiki '2D Map Creation' Satellite Background Image field on MapEntity.et).
S3.evidence: No single Workbench API call captures/exports a satellite tile; extracting + retiling the .edds is the T-090.1 basemap pipeline. Per locked decision: document source + escalate, do NOT fabricate a tile. K3 RED blocks T-090.1 with a concrete source path.

S4.result: FAIL on gate (no tile produced) — but feasibility RESOLVED: real cartographic source exists (synth NOT required)
S4.cartographicSource: World Editor toolbar 'Export Map Data' -> Map Geometry Data .topo (road network, buildings, airfields) + Satellite Background Image. A genuine in-engine cartographic export.
S4.note: synthesized-cartographic (N9) is NOT strictly required — Reforger exposes a real cartographic data export. No tile was produced this spike (tile build = T-090.1.1 GUI tool). K4 gate RED honestly, but the Map basemap path is de-risked.

S5.evidence: Vegetation is placed as INDIVIDUAL entities reachable by QueryEntitiesByAABB (e.g. {D9DF1D13919F19A0}Prefabs/Vegetation/Bush/b_rosa_canina_0s.et exported with transform). No explicit forest-region object / engine forest-mask API found ('GenSpawnableEntity' returned nothing; only procedural CLUTTER under Assets/Clutter/Procedural for grass). Therefore forests must be DERIVED from tree-entity clusters.

S6.anglesOrderFinding: IEntity.GetAngles() returns (component0 = rotation about X / pitch, component1 = rotation about Y = HEADING/yaw, component2 = rotation about Z / roll). Empirically confirmed: upright buildings (Castle_01_InnerWall_*, Well_01) have ang0~0 and ang2~0 while ang1 carries the placement heading (e.g. House_Mountain ang1=47, House_Wooden ang1=-28.834, Castle walls 120/115/-62.49). The plugin's row field labelled 'pitchDeg' (=ang1) is the real heading; the field labelled 'yawDeg' (=ang0) is pitch.
S6.recommendationForT090_3: Emit headingDeg = GetAngles()[1] (or use IEntity.GetYawPitchRoll() whose component [0] is yaw directly). Do NOT trust ang[0] as yaw.

gatesNote: Enumeration-proven minimum (K1 + K1b + K7) GREEN -> spike slice DONE. K2 green (real OBB). K5 green (forest = derived-hull). K6 green (heading remap measured). K3 RED: satellite source found, tile capture = T-090.1 (blocks T-090.1 with a clear path). K4 RED on gate: no tile produced, but a REAL cartographic source exists (synth not required) -> T-090.1.1 de-risked. No fabricated tiles.

handednessRemap.enfusionBasis: Y-up, left-handed; +X east, +Y up, +Z north. Horizontal plane = (X, Z).
handednessRemap.editorToExport: editor Deck.gl (x = worldX, y = worldZ north); mod export z = editor y (T-090 coordinate contract). Glyph rotation / spawn heading = GetAngles()[1] (yaw about world-up Y); GetAngles()[0]=pitch, [2]=roll.

sampleEntity.interpretation: upright building: pitch(ang0)=0, heading(ang1)=47 deg, roll(ang2)=0 -> heading is ang[1]

satellite.method: sap-supertexture-stitch (T-090.1.2, supersedes interim T-090.1 rasterization). decode-edds.mjs reads 2500 worlds/Eden/Eden/.Data/Eden_<N>_supertexture.edds via enfusion-mcp PakVirtualFS (zlib) -> Enfusion DX10 BC7 (dxgi 99) chunked mips (COPY + 'LZ4 ' 8-byte-prefix raw block; pure-JS LZ4) -> vendor/bcdec.wasm BC7->RGBA -> stitch row-major (N=y*50+x; cell gridY=0 = world Z=0/south) assembled NORTH-UP (south at image bottom) into 12800x12800 @ 1 m/px -> build-tile-pyramid.sh --lossless (no --flip-v) -> z0-6 WebP LOSSLESS (VP8L; T-090.1.2.1, supersedes interim lossy q=80 z0-5). 1 m/px native (3.1x the interim 4096x4096/3.125 m/px). North-up fixed post-render review (initial stitch shipped upside-down). K3 CLOSED.
satellite.evidence: P0 spike PASS (.ai/artifacts/t090_1_2_decode_spike.json): cell decode RGB AE=PAE=MAE=0 vs liblz4+Pillow oracle; full 50x50 mosaic = recognizable Everon, same orientation as interim ortho. SAP supertextures are the real in-game ground (vs interim stylized shaded-relief). Decoder vendored bcdec v0.97 -> bcdec.wasm (clang wasm32), no native deps.

map.note: REAL cartographic source found: World Editor 'Export Map Data' -> .topo Map Geometry Data (roads/buildings/airfields). N9 synth NOT strictly required; tile production = T-090.1.1.

waterComposite.oceanMaskSource: dem-below-sea-level — engine GetTerrainSurfaceY DEM (T-091.0) <= 0 m; depth drives the oceanDark→oceanBright ramp (engine palette from TBD_SatelliteExportPlugin.c SetupColors)
waterComposite.inlandMaskSource: supertexture-water-appearance-dem-filtered — pixels the engine's SAP renderer drew with the underwater/seabed treatment (smooth desaturated grey), cross-filtered by DEM: coast exclusion, engine-exact-flat pad rejection (kills runways/graded bases), slope rejection (kills rock faces), density opening (kills roads/roofs), min-area 2000 m²; 38 accepted bodies (central lake 18.8 ha + river network + coastal wetlands), each visually audited

refine2.summary: Eden.topo fully decoded offline (decode-topo.mjs): 6 LOD sections x 888 records = the engine ROAD network (5 classes incl. runway lines; PWLN trailing group = powerlines; NO hydro layer). Exact road-corridor subtraction via component roadFrac guard (<=0.45) removes the residual path/ditch FP class (FP bodies measured roadFrac 0.72-0.84 vs lake 0.001 / SE river 0.163); several earlier 'rivers' proven to be roads at full res and correctly dropped. Wet-channel stream class relaxed (valleyFrac>=0.6, sat<=0.18, lum<=0.31) for the dry-gully FN gap. 153 accepted bodies, montage-audited. One-button pipeline: make map-water-everon (restore -> mask -> composite -> bundle + manifest bytes auto-patch -> pyramid -> verifies), terrain-parameterized via TOPO_TERRAINS.
refine2.topoFraming: header 0x18B (@0x10 sections=6, @0x14 perSection=888); record=[u8 type][u32 n][n x f32LE x,y][u32 K][K x u32]; y = north-up image metres

refine.summary: inland mask two-tier refine: compact-class flatFrac 0.5→0.12 kills engine-graded town pavement (all operator FP sites rejected, 0 bodies within 250 m); new linear class splits grey rivers (engine water appearance, soft carve-or-lowland guard) from wet channels (dark carved mountain streams — DEM valley carve boxBlur(48 m)−DEM > 0.8 m mandatory at valleyFrac >= 0.7). 114 accepted bodies (25/38 prior retained — 13 dropped all pavement-class — + 85 new stream/marsh segments), all montage-audited. Eden.topo probe: BE-float32 world-coord polylines confirmed, framing undecoded (T-090.8 lead).

waterComposite.forbiddenMethodsAttestation: no hand-painted lakes, no AI rivers, no solid rectangles — every water pixel comes from engine data (DEM heights or engine-rendered supertexture), land pixels outside the mask are byte-identical
waterComposite.blockedCandidates: Eden_<N>_layer.edds splat weights decoded but material palette locked in Eden_<N>.ttile/Eden.ent (non-zlib pak codec); .Rivers flow maps + .Shore atlas readable but placements live in Eden.ent; Workbench in game mode at spike time (WorldEditorAPI unavailable) — see spike JSON for the full trail
